title: Ontology Binding Contract
description: Consumer Ontology identity/version binding for Altitude-2 read/proposal/commit routing (execution-plan.md section 6.3 Operation state machine, BOUND_CONSUMER_ONTOLOGY). Runtime-neutral; never carries consumer domain definitions (consumer-domain-ownership, ADR-001) — identity and version only. Real content P330.

consumerProjectId.description: The owning ~/projects/<project> repository identity (ADR-001/ADR-006 per-project storage authority).

successorVersion.description: The palantir-ontology successor version this binding was formed against.

bindingScope.description: The maximum Altitude-2 operation-state-machine step this binding authorizes (READ_OR_QUERY / PROPOSAL / up to and including COMMIT). Never grants commit authority by itself — that is the separate mutation-authority envelope (ADR-005).
